items: Added HideChatButtonsOnFocus plugin
Added CollapseChannelName plugin
Added remove rounded edges css snippet
Added FullScreenSidebar plugin
Added support for swiping to toggle member list
Added RemoveGifButton plugin
Added Ava's css to stop status card from clipping when a user has a long status
Added BetterScrolling plugin (allows you to scroll lower in channel/dm lists so you can actually access the channel/dm at the very bottom)
Added css to make member list scrollable (however you have to close the member list then open it again for the css to work)
Added MemberListContextMenuFix plugin
NoAnnoyingToolTips plugin no longer removes badge tooltips
Updated to Avia Client 1.7
Made avia panels draggable
Reduced amount of time required for presses to trigger context menus
Removed MobileCSSPlus plugin (its functionality is now integrated into the default quick css editor)
AttachmentContextMenuFix plugin now works on non image/video attachments
Fixed swipe-sidebar plugin triggering when moving popups horizontally
Fixed swipe-sidebar plugin triggering when trying to select text
Fixed ChannelContextMenuFix plugin not working on categories (you couldn't long press categories to open the context menu for editing/deleting them previously,now you can)
Fixed emoji and gif picker search bars requiring a long press to type in
Fixed swipe-sidebar plugin triggering when scrolling in attachments
Fixed channel settings button appearing on big user profile popups
Fixed whisper not hiding "Switch to this voice channel" card
Fixed swipe-sidebar causing weird behaviour when swiping with member/pinned messages list or search results open
Fixed tapping on a server immediately after loading stoat hiding the sidebar on ipads/tablets
Fixed ChunkyMembers not making the member list chunky if it was already open before the plugin loaded
Fixed local plugins import button not allowing js files to be selected
